name: Williams-Sonoma, Inc.
summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. is a multi-channel specialty retailer of home furnishings and gourmet cookware. The company operates under several brands including Williams Sonoma, Pottery Barn, Pottery Barn Kids, PBteen, West Elm, Mark and Graham, and Rejuvenation. It offers a range of products for home and lifestyle, including furniture, lighting, kitchenware, bedding, and decorative accessories.
